zh.lifeSummary: 當John Alex Sheffield於1727年12月13日出生在美國維吉尼亞州亨利可時，他的父親Adam Sheffield40歲，母親Mary Elizabeth Everitt Averitt32歲。他於1748年與Hannah Melton在美國北卡羅來納州摩爾結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1796年2月在美國北卡羅來納州摩爾享年68歲，埋葬在美國北卡羅來納州摩爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Alex Sheffield于1727年12月13日出生在美国弗吉尼亚州亨利可时，他的父亲Adam Sheffield40岁，母亲Mary Elizabeth Everitt Averitt32岁。他于1748年与Hannah Melton在美国北卡罗来纳州摩爾结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1796年2月在美国北卡罗来纳州摩爾享年68岁，埋葬在美国北卡罗来纳州摩爾。

nameMeanings.name: Sheffield
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name principally from Sheffield (Yorkshire), but perhaps also from Sheffield Bottom in Burghfield (Berkshire), or Sheffield Park in Fletching (Sussex). The Yorkshire place takes its name from the river Sheaf, itself from Old English scēath ‘boundary’, + Old English feld ‘open country’, while the Berkshire placename derives from Old English scēo ‘shelter’ + feld. The Sussex placename comes from Old English scēap ‘sheep’ + feld.

variants.name: Shuffield
meanings: English: variant of   Sheffield  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Alex
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Alexander  ,   Alexandra  , and   Alexis ;  also commonly used as a given name in its own right.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alix
meanings: Variant of   Alex  , used only as a feminine name. Its formation has probably been influenced by   Alice .

variants.name: Alexandra
meanings: feminine form of   Alexander .  It was very little used in the English-speaking world before the 20th century, when it was brought in from Scandinavia and Eastern Europe. It owes its sudden rise in popularity in Britain at the end of the 19th century to  Queen Alexandra ,  Danish  wife of  Edward VII .

historicEvents.title: Mount Vernon
historicEvents.description: Mount Vernon Plantation was the home of George Washington. It started off as 2,000 acres and was later expanded to 8,000 acres. The house itself started off as a six room building then got extended to twenty-one rooms.
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: A Free America
historicEvents.description: The Revolutionary War ended with the signing of the Treaty of Paris which gave the new nation boundries on which they could expand and trade with other countries without any problems.

historicEvents.title: Becomes the 10th state
historicEvents.description: On June 25, 1788 Virginia became the 10th state.

en.lifeSummary: When John Alex Sheffield was born on 13 December 1727, in Henrico, Virginia, United States, his father, Adam Sheffield, was 40 and his mother, Mary Elizabeth Everitt Averitt, was 32. He married Hannah Melton in 1748, in Moore, North Carolina, United States. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 8 daughters. He died in February 1796, in Moore, North Carolina, United States, at the age of 68, and was buried in Moore, North Carolina, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Alex Sheffield est né le 13 décembre 1727, à Henrico, Virginie, États-Unis, son père, Adam Sheffield, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Mary Elizabeth Everitt Averitt, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Hannah Melton en 1748, à Moore, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé en février 1796, à Moore, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Moore, Caroline du Nord, États-Unis.

de.Bullucks Crossroads, Edgecombe, North Ca: Bullucks Crossroads, Edgecombe, North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten
de.lifeSummary: Als John Alex Sheffield am 13. Dezember 1727 in Henrico, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam Sheffield 40 und seine Mutter Mary Elizabeth Everitt Averitt 32. Er hat 1748 in Moore, North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten Hannah Melton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb im Februar 1796 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Moore, North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Moore, North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: John Alex Sheffieldが1727年12月13日にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州ヘンリコで生まれた時，父Adam Sheffieldは40歳，母Mary Elizabeth Everitt Averittは32歳であった。1748年にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ムーアでHannah Meltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1796年2月にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ムーアで68歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州ムーアにて埋葬された。

ko.Bullucks Crossroads, Edgecombe, North Ca: 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 에지코브 불럭스 크로스로드즈
ko.lifeSummary: John Alex Sheffield(이)가 1727년 12월 13일 미국 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam Sheffield(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Elizabeth Everitt Averitt(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1748년 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 무어에서 Hannah Melton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1796년 2월 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 무어에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주 무어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Alex Sheffield nasceu em 13 de dezembro de 1727, em Henrico, Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Adam Sheffield, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Mary Elizabeth Everitt Averitt, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Hannah Melton em 1748, em Moore, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em fevereiro de 1796, em Moore, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Moore, Carolina do Norte, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Bullucks Crossroads, Edgecombe, North Ca: буллуккс кроссроадс, эджекомб, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Alex Sheffield родился 13 декабря 1727 г. в местности хенрику, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Adam Sheffield было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Elizabeth Everitt Averitt, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Hannah Melton в 1748 г. в местности мур, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 8 дочерей. Он умер февраль 1796 г. в местности мур, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности мур, Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Alex Sheffield nació el 13 de diciembre de 1727, en Henrico, Virginia, Estados Unidos, su papá, Adam Sheffield, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Mary Elizabeth Everitt Averitt, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Hannah Melton en 1748, en Moore, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en febrero de 1796, en Moore, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Moore, Carolina del Norte, Estados Unidos.
